bead.title: Stage 2.11: Subscription resolver — beadLifecycle + bead store event bus
bead.description: Implement subscription resolver for beadLifecycle(projectID). May require adding a new event bus to cli/internal/bead/ if missing. New file cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_sub_bead.go. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 2 bead #24.
bead.acceptance: (1) Integration test verifies events arrive. (2) MANUAL: subscribe in GraphiQL, run `ddx bead update <id> --status ready` in another terminal, see the lifecycle event arrive within 1 second. Record in completion note.
